'''damara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swale|swale]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swale|swale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| damara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmæræth|dæmæræth]] || [[word:dæmæræj|dæmæræj]] || [[word:dæmæræsh|dæmæræsh]] || [[word:dæmæræ|dæmæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:damamarath|damamarath]] || [[word:damamaraj|damamaraj]] || [[word:damamarash|damamarash]] || [[word:damamara|damamara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:damarath|damarath]] || [[word:damaraj|damaraj]] || [[word:damarash|damarash]] || [[word:damara|damara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:damafrath|damafrath]] || [[word:damafraj|damafraj]] || [[word:damafrash|damafrash]] || [[word:damafraf|damafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damaratha|damaratha]] || [[word:damaraja|damaraja]] || [[word:damarasha|damarasha]] || [[word:damaraka|damaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damarath|damarath]] || [[word:damaraj|damaraj]] || [[word:damarash|damarash]] || [[word:damara|damara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damarathal|damarathal]] || [[word:damarajal|damarajal]] || [[word:damarashal|damarashal]] || [[word:damarakal|damarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damarathatha|damarathatha]] || [[word:damarajaja|damarajaja]] || [[word:damarashasha|damarashasha]] || [[word:damaraka|damaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damarathan|damarathan]] || [[word:damarajan|damarajan]] || [[word:damarashan|damarashan]] || [[word:damarakan|damarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damarathaoro|damarathaoro]] || [[word:damarajaoro|damarajaoro]] || [[word:damarashaoro|damarashaoro]] || [[word:damarakaoro|damarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
